title: Intense Garlicky Canadian Prawns Stir-fry
description: A quick, garlicky Canadian stir‑fry featuring succulent prawns, fresh bell pepper, broccoli, and cucumber, perfect for a date‑night dinner.
instructions: Heat the comal over medium heat until shimmering.
Add 1 tbsp olive oil and sauté 4 minced garlic cloves for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add 500g peeled prawns and cook 2 minutes per side until pink, then remove to plate.
Stir‑fry 1 sliced red bell pepper and 1 cup broccoli florets in the same comal for 3 minutes.
Add 1/2 cup sliced cucumber and cook 1 minute more.
Return prawns to pan, sprinkle with 1 tsp smoked paprika, 1/2 tsp ground cumin, and a pinch of sea salt.
Toss all ingredients together and cook for 1 minute to meld flavors.
Serve hot, optionally garnishing with chopped fresh parsley or a squeeze of lime.
